text:
There was once a young girl named Lily. She lived under a big cherry blossom tree near her grandma's house. Every morning Lily would hop into fluffy clouds and fly around seeing how far she could go. Last week she flew so far she landed on vacation paradise.

She loved snorkeling off reef edges. One day she met a fish who had glasses. He was so friendly.

She took photos of seashells. One day she found a lost mermaid's. It had orange hair!

One afternoon she swam with dolphins. They laughed.

That night she saw a ghost pirate. He wore a black vest.

She didn't scream. She smiled. She'd seen ghost movies. That's what they were. Happy ghosts.

She waved. She promised to visit sooner. Then she flew home. She always wanted adventure. She just needed one less scary ghost.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
